  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kauzeet juhs Preedeß/ ta-
ehz ka tee Zeedra-Rohki irr krit-
tuschi/ un tee Warreni pohſtiti
rr. Kauzeet juhs Ohſolt eekſch
Bahsana/ tapehz ka tas ſtiprs
Mesch irr apkritis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur irr weena Rauſcha-
nas Balkſne to Gannu/ tapehz
ka wigun Godiba irr pohſtita/
weena Ruheſchanas Balkſne to
jaunu Lauwu/ tapehz ka ta Jar-
dana Greſniba pohſtita irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä ſakka tas KUNGS
mans Decws: Ganni ſchays
kanjamas Awis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo winno Turretaji no-
kanj tahs/ un ne turr to par No-
ſeegumu/ un ikweens no winno
Bahrdewejcem ſakka: Slawehts
laid irr-tas KUNGS/ ka es ef-
nu baggats täppis/ un neweene
no winno Ganneem fauds tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teefcham/ es ne landſechu
wairs ſchahs Semines Gedih
wotajus/ ſakka tas KUNGS:
Bet redſ/ es nodohſchu tobß Zil-
wekus ikweenu fawam Tuwa-
kam Rohkâ/ un fawain Kelni-
ram Rohkâ/ ka teem buhs tcho
Semuni ſagranſt/ un es ne arib-
bu tohs iſpeſtibt no winnu Roh-
kas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es gannifcbu ſchahs
kanjamas Awis/ tapehz ka tee
behdtgi ſihki Lohpi irraid/ un es
jehmu preekſch ſewis divi Sis-
lus/ to weenu nofauze es Jau-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es nomaitaju trihß
Gannus weenä Mehnefi/ jo
mannai Dwehſelei bij Apnik-
ſchana pahr teem/ ir winnu
Dwehſelei pee mannim reebahß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es fazziju: Es ne gan-
nischu juhs wairak/ kas mirſt/
tas lai mirſt/ kas nomaitahtß
tohp/ lat tas tohp maitahts/ un
kas atleek/ lat tas ta ohtra Mee-
fu aprihj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es kehmu mannu Siſ-
li Jaukums/ un falaustjn to/ un
isnihzinaju mannu Derribu/ ko
es ar ſcheem Laudim btju darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta tappe tai Deend-
isnihzinata. Tad atsinne tee
nabbagi ſihki Lohpi/ kas mannis
gardija/ ka tasta KUNGA
Wahrds bijan.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es fazziju uhs teem:
Ja tas labß irr juhtäs Azzis/
tad atneffeet mannu Makſu/ be-
ja ne/ tad lat fahw. Un tee ee-
wehre mannu Makſu trihßdef-
mits Sudraba Sabbatus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzija
uhs man: Nomett to preekeſt
fa Bohdneeka/ weena gohdig-
Makſa/ zik dahrgu tee manni
turrejſchi irr. Un es kehmu rohe-
trihßoefmits Sudraba Gabba-
lus/ uu nomettu tohs eekſch ta
KUNGA Namuna preekeſch ta
Bohdneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad falaustju es mannu
ohtru Siſli Sahpe/ un isnihzi
"
    }
